title: Bedtime Story for Kids: Cloud Train Dreams | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
CHOO CHOO! The cloud train floats soft and slow!
A gentle bedtime story for kids with Benny, Teddy, and a sleepy cloud train.
Toddlers practice calm breathing and cozy bedtime words before sleep.
Kid-safe American English cartoon story for ages 2-8.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
